data.title: Did Michael Saylor dump $4 billion Bitcoin?
data.description:
As cryptocurrency markets continue to face downward sentiment, on-chain data sparked speculation over whether Michael Saylor’s company, Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR), had off-loaded billions of dollars worth of Bitcoin (BTC) this week. However, new evidence shows the movements were not sales,  they were part of a large-scale custodial migration quietly unfolding for two weeks. On November 14, blockchain analytics firm Arkham detected a massive cluster of transactions involving Strategy-linked wallets. Since midnight UTC, the company shifted 43,415 BTC, roughly $4
source: https://finbold.com/did-michael-saylor-dump-4-billion-bitcoin/

data.title: Founders Fund, founded by Silicon Valley mogul Peter Thiel, reduced its holdings of ETHZilla stock.
data.description: According to filings with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Founders Fund, a venture capital firm led by billionaire and top Silicon Valley investor Peter Thiel, held 928,389 shares of Ethereum treasury company ETHZilla as of September 30, 2025, representing 5.6% of ETHZilla's stock. This represents a 1.9% reduction in ETHZilla shares by September 30, compared to the 7.5% stake reported on August 4.

data.title: Kraken Reveals the Truth: The Future of Crypto Isn’t Bitcoin’s Price
data.description:

source: https://www.ethnews.com/kraken-reveals-the-truth-the-future-of-crypto-isnt-bitcoins-price/

data.title: Skybridge Capital founders and Solari Capital have invested over $100 million in American Bitcoin.
data.description: Fortune magazine revealed that Solari Capital, the venture capital firm founded by Skybridge founder Anthony Scaramucci and his son AJ Scaramucci, participated in a $220 million funding round in July for American Bitcoin, a Bitcoin mining company associated with the Trump family. Solari Capital invested over $100 million, and Anthony Scaramucci himself also invested a smaller amount, but both declined to disclose the specific investment amounts. (Fortune)

data.title: New York Fed calls top Wall Street banks to discuss strains in key lending tool
data.description:
The drama kicked off in New York this week when John Williams, the head of the New York Fed, pulled top Wall Street dealers into a sudden, closed‑door meeting to talk about rising tensions inside a key short‑term lending tool. The meeting happened on Wednesday on the sidelines of the central bank’s Treasury market conference, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/new-york-fed-calls-top-wall-street-banks/

data.title: Bitcoin Bottom Is In & Strategy Did Not Sell 47,000 BTC: Michael Saylor
data.description:
In recent Bitcoin news, Michael Saylor refuted claims that Strategy sold portions of its Bitcoin (BTC) treasury. Arkham data had suggested the company’s holdings dropped from 484,000 to approximately 437,000 BTC. Saylor responded to a social media report with an explicit denial
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/11/15/bitcoin-bottom-is-in-strategy-did-not-sell-47000-btc-michael-saylor/

data.title: Bit Digital Q3 revenue hits $30.5M as Ethereum transition gathers pace
data.description:
Bit Digital reported its third‑quarter earnings last night and said its revenue for Q3 2025 reached $30. 5 million, based on figures it released in its new filing. The company said the jump from the $22. 8 million it reported a year earlier came from strong activity in its WhiteFiber unit and higher staking income from Ethereum. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bit-digital-q3-revenue-hits-30-5m/

data.title: Bitcoin Market Top May Be In As Analyst Shares 1,064-Day Bull Cycle Pattern – Details
data.description:
In the last week, Bitcoin lost the $100,000 support zone, marking another drastic turn in an extensive correction phase. Since then, prices have traded as low as $94,700 as the premier cryptocurrency strives to find market stability. Amid rising speculations on the current status of the crypto bull run, market expert Ali Martinez shares a technical analysis that may yet confirm many investors’ fears. Related Reading: Massive Bitcoin Bid Walls Spotted On Binance: Bulls Step In With 2,800 BTC Cluster 1,064-Day Cycle Hints Bitcoin Bull Rally May Be Over Since hitting a new all-time high of $126,000 in early October, Bitcoin slipped into a heavy correction phase, losing 24
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-market-top-may-be-in-as-analyst-shares-1064-day-bull-cycle-pattern-details/

data.title: Chainlink, Hedera, and Avalanche Lead Real-World Asset Development
data.description:
Santiment’s latest developer-activity rankings reveal a major surge of work across Real-World Asset (RWA) ecosystems, with Chainlink, Hedera, and Avalanche taking the top three spots for the past 30 days. The dataset tracks GitHub commits, code pushes, upgrades, and development velocity across each protocol’s repositories, an increasingly important signal for long-term crypto strength.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/chainlink-hedera-and-avalanche-lead-real-world-asset-development/

data.title: XRP’s First U.S. Spot ETF Launches With Huge Demand But Market Turbulence Steals the Spotlight
data.description:
After years of filings, legal battles, and regulatory delays, the first U. S. spot XRP ETF made its debut on Thursday, a milestone that many in the industry once doubted would ever happen. Canary Capital’s ETF opened to immediate demand, pulling in close to $250 million on its first day and setting the stage for what […] The post XRP’s First U
source: https://www.ethnews.com/xrps-first-u-s-spot-etf-launches-with-huge-demand-but-market-turbulence-steals-the-spotlight/
